pi_items.source: O*NET / BLS SOC classification. 15-2041.01 is Biostatisticians. 19-1011.00 is Animal Scientists.
Biostatistician (15-2041.01) belongs to SOC Major Group 15-0000 (Computer and Mathematical Occupations). The claimed group (19-0000) corresponds to the fabricated Animal Scientist code.
Manual inspection of the task scripts confirms these features accurately reflect the task workflow.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated clinical trial data for 200 patients, containing 6 seeded statistical and regulatory methodology bugs in a Python pipeline. The target occupation is a Biostatistician in the Pharmaceutical industry, but the metadata falsely claims the O*NET occupation code 19-1011.00 (which belongs to Animal Scientists) and its associated SOC Major Group 'Life, Physical, and Social Science'. The correct code for Biostatisticians is 15-2041.01, falling under 'Computer and Mathematical Occupations'. The verifier correctly enforces a 60-point pass threshold, scoring 16-17 points per fixed bug.
